title: limonium pseudarticulatum
intro: Limonium pseudarticulatum, also known as sea lavender or statice, is a flowering plant species in the family Plumbaginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and depression, and supporting immune function. Limonium pseudarticulatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to soothe respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
